name: create-access0x1
description: One-command scaffolder for the Access0x1 non-custodial, USD-priced (Chainlink) crypto payments stack — run it straight from the repo (`node packages/create-access0x1/bin/index.mjs my-app`, or copy the template with `npx degit Access0x1/Access0x1/templates/starter my-app`) to drop a runnable Next.js checkout (@access0x1/react <PayButton>) plus your own BYO Foundry contracts. Zero runtime dependencies; only Node builtins.
author: Access0x1
